title: Production-Ready Web Apps
description: Take your app from 'it works' to 'it survives the real world at scale.' Master system design, database optimization, background jobs, caching, observability, infrastructure as code, security, and reliability through a single through-line project: scaling Gather to 100K users.
prerequisites: Full-Stack Python course (or equivalent Django + Next.js experience)

modules.title: System Design Thinking
modules.project: Gather Architecture Review -- analyze bottlenecks, diagram the system, propose a target architecture in an ADR

modules.title: Database Performance and Optimization
modules.project: Gather Under Load -- seed 100K events, profile slow queries, add indexes, set up PgBouncer, benchmark

modules.title: Background Jobs and Task Queues
modules.project: Async RSVP Pipeline -- move email and notifications to Celery, add retry with backoff and Flower monitoring

modules.title: Caching Strategies
modules.project: Speed Up Gather -- implement three caching layers for the event detail page and benchmark before/after

modules.title: Object Storage and File Processing
modules.project: Gather Image Pipeline -- presigned URL uploads, Celery thumbnail generation, responsive images with srcset

modules.title: Real-Time at Scale
modules.project: Gather Live -- SSE with Redis Pub/Sub for live RSVP counts across multiple server instances

modules.title: Observability and Incident Response
modules.project: Gather Observability Stack -- OpenTelemetry instrumentation, Grafana dashboard, and incident runbook

modules.title: Advanced Deployment and Infrastructure
modules.project: Gather Zero-Downtime Deploy -- blue-green deploy, Terraform staging, feature flags with gradual rollout

modules.title: Security and Reliability Patterns
modules.project: Gather Resilience Audit -- OWASP audit, circuit breakers, automated backups, chaos testing with toxiproxy

modules.title: Capstone: Gather at Scale
modules.project: Production Launch -- load test 1K concurrent users, hit p95 targets, build observability dashboard, record demo

author: We Build Black
